## Summary

What should be clearer, added, or aligned across platforms?

## Affected files (if known)

- e.g. `Start-Guide/Quick-Start-Guide.md`, `minimal-tools/linux/...`

## Proposed change

Describe the improvement. Draft text is welcome.

## Why this helps readers

Who benefits (beginners, escalators, specific OS users)?

## Security / ethics check

- [ ] Stays within educational self-help scope
- [ ] Does not add offensive techniques or legal advice
- [ ] Preserves evidence-first principles
